Footer.description: Leading manufacturer of precision surgical instruments with a global reach. ISO certified quality and commitment to healthcare excellence.
Footer.address: Tecno Industries, Industrial Estate, Sialkot, Pakistan

Hero.description: Manufacturing world-class surgical instruments with aerospace-grade precision for the global healthcare community.

Home.threeDDescription: Rotate and examine our surgical instruments in real-time.
Home.nylonDesc1: Our proprietary nylon coating technology provides superior grip, reduces hand fatigue, and enhances instrument longevity.
Home.nylonDesc2: Each coating is tested to withstand 500+ autoclave cycles.
Home.exhibitionDesc: Join us at the largest international gathering of medical professionals and surgical instrument innovators.
Home.ctaDesc: Whether you need a single prototype or bulk orders, our team delivers precision instruments tailored to your specifications.

About.title: Shaping the Future of Surgery Through Innovation
About.description1: Thank you for choosing TECNO products. TECNO is an industry leader in research, design, development and manufacturing of “electrosurgical instruments”.
About.description2: Manufactured with high quality stainless steels and coated with special unbreakable and non-toxic nylon material. Our fine instruments are hand-crafted for precision and longevity.
About.storyDesc1: Founded in 1998 in Sialkot, Pakistan – the global hub for surgical instrument manufacturing.
About.storyDesc2: With a team of over 200 skilled artisans and engineers, we produce over 5,000 different surgical, dental, and beauty instruments.
About.missionDesc: To advance surgical excellence by providing cutting-edge electrosurgical instruments that enhance precision, safety, and efficiency.
About.visionDesc: To revolutionize surgical precision and patient care by delivering innovative, reliable, and safe electrosurgical devices.

Contact.description: We're here to help. Contact us for any inquiries, support, or partnership opportunities.
Contact.connectDesc: Follow our official channels to stay updated with our latest innovations in medical instruments.
Contact.successDesc: We've received your message and will get back to you soon.

Sustainability.title: Sustainability
Sustainability.subtitle: Our commitment to environmental responsibility and sustainable manufacturing practices

initiatives.materialsDesc: We source sustainable materials and minimize waste in our manufacturing processes.
initiatives.packagingDesc: All our packaging materials are recyclable and biodegradable. We're committed to reducing plastic usage.
initiatives.waterDesc: Our state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities incorporate advanced water recycling systems.
initiatives.solarDesc: We've invested in renewable energy infrastructure, with solar panels powering 60% of our operations.

Sustainability.ctaDesc: Advancing surgical excellence by providing cutting-edge instruments.

Technology.title: Technology & Manufacturing
Technology.subtitle: Our Sialkot plant combines decades of artisanal expertise with modern CNC machining.

items.cncDesc: Computer-controlled manufacturing ensures micron-level precision across every instrument batch.
items.inspectionDesc: Multi-stage inspection using digital measurement tools and visual quality control.
items.coatingDesc: Proprietary coating withstands 500+ autoclave cycles and reduces hand fatigue.
items.testingDesc: Every batch of raw material is tested for composition, hardness, and corrosion resistance.
